title: Verify project prerequisites and access
description: Verify that required database access, environment variables, dependencies, and Supabase credentials are available before starting the chunked transcription implementation.
acceptanceCriteria: `.env.local` contains placeholders for required environment variables.
Real secret values are kept local and never written to repository files, task specs, logs, or chat.
Supabase configuration and database credentials are ready.

steps.details: Open `.agent/prd/PRD.md` and review the `Prerequisites and Access` section.
Ensure `.env.local` exists and contains: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, SUPABASE_BUCKET, SUPABASE_SECRET_KEY, and GEMINI_API_KEY.
Verify access to the Supabase database via the Supabase MCP server tools.

technicalNotes: Do not commit actual API keys or passwords to GitHub. Use .env.local locally.
